LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KATIE NELSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. (CCP 473(B).) DEFENDANT KATIE NELSON HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT SHE IS ENTITLED TO DISCRETIONARY RELIEF PURSUANT TO CCP 473(B) ON THE GROUND OF SURPRISE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT KATIE NELSON'S Motion To Set Aside Default is granted. (CCP 473(b).) Defendant Katie Nelson has demonstrated that she is entitled to discretionary relief pursuant to CCP 473(b) on the ground of surprise. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
